title: Working With Structs: Code Examples
text: Working With Structs: Code Examples To illustrate how Structs can be manipulated, you can inspect and execute the following ProcScript examples. For a case study in which data is converted from XML to Uniface component entities and back again, see Example: Struct Conversions . Tip: For your convenience, you can copy the code of all the examples from Struct Code Examples and paste it into a Uniface trigger or operation (such as the EXEC operation of a test component). Compile the component, test it, and view the message frame to see the output. Print Header Function This is a utility function that use by the other examples to provide a header. function printHeader params string pFunctionName : IN endparams putmess "===============================" putmess " run of %%pFunctionName%%%" putmess "===============================" end ;- function printHeader Copy Was this topic helpful?
